S.FORM: Posong (niyaro') I Mingkok 58 a mihecaan mapatongal iPawsangli nani Seweyli kona niyaro'. I kaikor no Taytongnicong a kongkoan ko kasaniyaro' no Posong.
S.PHON: po~uso~uŋ (nijaro~uʡ) i miŋko~uk ** a miħəʦaan mapato~uŋaɾ ipawsaŋɾi nani səwəjɾi ko~una nijaro~uʡ. i kaiko~ur no~u tajto~uŋniʦo~uŋ a ko~uŋko~uan ko~u kasanijaro~uʡ no~u po~uso~uŋ.
S.FORM: Posong (niyaro') I Mingkok 58 a mihecaan mapatongal iPawsangli nani Seweyli kona niyaro'. I kaikor no Taytongnicong a kongkoan ko kasaniyaro' no Posong.
S.PHON: po~uso~uŋ (nijaro~uʡ) i miŋko~uk ** a miħəʦaan mapato~uŋaɾ ipawsaŋɾi nani səwəjɾi ko~una nijaro~uʡ. i kaiko~ur no~u tajto~uŋniʦo~uŋ a ko~uŋko~uan ko~u kasanijaro~uʡ no~u po~uso~uŋ.
